---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LOBSTER
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Use Case
Who would benefit from this feature and in what context?
(e.g. researchers working with large survey datasets)

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Any mockups, examples, or references that might help.
